title: Link input schema for hook writers.

version._deprecated: Instead of versioning the protocol with version numbers, each field has it's own life cycle. Individual fields can be marked deprecated and will be removed as a breaking change after some time.

_versionSkew.out_file: 'out_file' is not provided by older SDKs. Then, it must be $out_dir/output.json.
_versionSkew.version: Future SDKs will no longer provide 'version'.
